<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Check current wall boundaries
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Current wall boundaries:")
for r in [1, 27, 28, 32, 40, 50, 63]:
    line = ascii_lines[r]
    for c in range(63):
        if line[c] != line[c+1]:
            print(f"  Row {r}: col {c}: '{line[c]}' -> '{line[c+1]}'")

# Check segmentation for charcoal object
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nCharcoal object:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"  id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check if wall boundaries match yellow gap
print("\nYellow gap position: cols 38-39, rows 28-31")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
